name: Cool Ghoul Treats
recipeIngredient: Flavored drink mix, regular or sugar-free
recipeInstructions:
If the gloves have a powdery residue inside them, turn them inside out and soak in warm water or wipe with soapy water. Rinse and allow gloves to dry.
Mix your favorite fruit drink (sugar-free liquid freezes better than liquids with sugar) and pour into the gloves. Add enough drink to fill the gloves loosely but not so full that the fingers will not move.
Fasten the gloves with twist ties. Place paper towels on a cookie sheet and lay the hands on the paper towels.
Freeze until solid, about 4 hours or overnight.
Carefully cut off gloves with scissors.
Float the frozen hands in a bowl of punch for scary fun. If desired, add gummy worms to the juice before freezing.
